neural_information_flow.description: High-bandwidth discrete neural signaling — 10M bits/sec visual, 50 bits/sec conscious

shannon_entropy_neural.source: Biologically Mapped AGI Blueprint — Data Density
shannon_entropy_neural.description: H(X) = -Σ p(x)log₂p(x) applied to neural firing states

sensorimotor_feedback_loop.source: Biologically Mapped AGI Blueprint — Feedback Loops
sensorimotor_feedback_loop.description: Motor outputs generate sensory inputs; top-down neocortex modulates lower-level processing

hpa_axis_dynamics.source: Biologically Mapped AGI Blueprint — Endocrine System

channel_capacity_signaling.source: Biologically Mapped AGI Blueprint — Channel Capacity
channel_capacity_signaling.description: I(R;S) mutual information in endocrine signaling: NFkB ~1.0 bit, TRAIL ~3.41 bits

antifragile_immunity.source: Biologically Mapped AGI Blueprint — Immune System
antifragile_immunity.description: Clonal diversity → entropy phase transitions → immunodeficiency signatures

pattern_recognition_prr.source: Biologically Mapped AGI Blueprint — Immune Sensing
pattern_recognition_prr.description: PRR-based self/non-self discrimination → cognitive anomaly detection via TF-IDF

metabolic_imperative.source: Biologically Mapped AGI Blueprint — Metabolic Grounding
metabolic_imperative.description: ATP budget as artificial hunger: scarcity forces genuine valuation of computation

csbo_optimization.description: Circulatory System Based Optimization — blood mass movement as resource allocation algorithm

frontal_lobe_metacognition.source: Sovereign OS Neuro Blueprint — Frontal Lobe
frontal_lobe_metacognition.description: Executive function + self-monitoring: HD spike → OS inhibits LLM via parameter clamping

temporal_lobe_memory.source: Sovereign OS Neuro Blueprint — Temporal Lobe
temporal_lobe_memory.description: Symbolic Waypoint Routing: conceptual tags → relational graph → lateral imaginative jumps

limbic_dopamine_reward.source: Sovereign OS Neuro Blueprint — Limbic System
limbic_dopamine_reward.description: Dopamine spike on breakthrough → Serotonin suppresses stress → memory consolidation state

metacognitive_rna_engine.source: Sovereign OS Neuro Blueprint — Digital Genome
metacognitive_rna_engine.description: RNA mutation: temporary prompt variants tested → beneficial mutations reverse-transcribed to DNA

biomimetic_vector_hierarchy.description: Hierarchical vector spaces: microscale (neuronal) → mesoscale (circuits) → macroscale (regions)

grounding_problem.description: Symbol grounding: T9 proves ungrounded LLM returns HD≈1.0 on live state queries

evolutionary_weight_scaling.description: Natural selection analog: weight_child = weight_parent / φ until floor 0.236

limbic_cortisol_loop.source: Biologically Mapped AGI Blueprint — HPA Stress Cascade
limbic_cortisol_loop.description: Cortisol spike cascade: amygdala threat detection → CRH release → ACTH → adrenal cortisol → hippocampal negative feedback inhibition. Maps to OS stress_level clamping at 0.8 hard cap.
limbic_cortisol_loop.math_grounding: dC/dt = k_stim × ACTH - k_inhib × C × GR_occupancy, equilibrium C* = k_stim/k_inhib
limbic_cortisol_loop.os_mapping: stress_level dynamic range 0.3→0.8, hard ceiling prevents excitotoxicity

bayesian_hierarchical_brain.source: Biologically Mapped AGI Blueprint — Phase 2 Hierarchical Bayesian
bayesian_hierarchical_brain.description: Predictive coding: each cortical layer generates top-down predictions, bottom-up signals carry only prediction error. Hierarchical Bayesian inference P(cause|sensory) ∝ P(sensory|cause)×P(cause).
bayesian_hierarchical_brain.math_grounding: P(h_l | h_{l+1}, x_l) ∝ P(x_l | h_l) × P(h_l | h_{l+1}), free energy F = KL[q(h)||p(h|x)]
bayesian_hierarchical_brain.os_mapping: knowledge_graph weight hierarchy = Bayesian prior hierarchy, Fibonacci scaling ≈ precision weighting

embodied_action_loop.source: Biologically Mapped AGI Blueprint — Active Inference / Embodied Action
embodied_action_loop.description: Active inference: action selected to minimize expected free energy F = E_q[log q(h) - log p(h,x)]. Motor commands are predictions about proprioceptive future states — errors drive reflex arcs.
embodied_action_loop.math_grounding: G = KL[q(o_τ|π)||p(o_τ)] + E_q[H[p(o_τ|h_τ)]], optimal policy π* = argmin G(π)
embodied_action_loop.os_mapping: agentic_orchestration action selection via free-energy minimization, grounding gap T14 is the measurement

clonal_selection_algorithm.source: Biologically Mapped AGI Blueprint — Immune System Optimization
clonal_selection_algorithm.description: CLONALG: population of B-cells expanded proportional to affinity, inversely mutated — high-affinity clones replicated, low-affinity suppressed. Convergence: O(N_pop × N_gen × affinity_eval) → globally optimal antibody.
clonal_selection_algorithm.math_grounding: mutation_rate ∝ 1/f_i, clone_count ∝ f_i, affinity f_i = 1 - d(antibody_i, antigen)/d_max
clonal_selection_algorithm.os_mapping: knowledge weight inheritance = clonal selection pressure, fib floor 0.236 = suppression threshold

natural_selection_simulator.source: Biologically Mapped AGI Blueprint — Evolutionary Algorithms
natural_selection_simulator.description: Genetic algorithm encoding NP-hard graph problems: chromosome = weight vector, fitness = -HD, selection pressure = tournament size k. Convergence guaranteed under Schema Theorem when crossover probability p_c < 0.9.
natural_selection_simulator.os_mapping: knowledge_graph edge evolution mirrors GA chromosome; fib weight decay = selection pressure

attention_bottleneck_theorem.source: Biologically Mapped AGI Blueprint — Information Bottleneck / Tishby 2015
attention_bottleneck_theorem.description: Conscious bandwidth limit: 10^7 bits/sec sensory input → ~50 bits/sec conscious throughput (ratio 200,000:1). Information Bottleneck: Z* = argmin I(X;Z) s.t. I(Y;Z) ≥ I_min. Z compresses X while preserving Y-relevant information.
attention_bottleneck_theorem.math_grounding: IB Lagrangian: L[p(z|x)] = I(X;Z) - β×I(Y;Z), β controls compression-relevance tradeoff. Optimal: β* where I(Y;Z) = I_min.
attention_bottleneck_theorem.os_mapping: RIR=0.9511 is the OS attention bottleneck — 95.11% of tokens are internal (compressed) vs 4.89% output

quantum_coherence.description: Maintenance of phase relationships between knowledge eigenstates. In Sovereign OS: coherence = HD_swarm < 0.05 (all domains in phase).
quantum_coherence.math_grounding: |ψ⟩ = Σ αᵢ|eigenstate_i⟩  |  Coherence = tr(ρ²) where ρ = density matrix

wave_function_collapse.description: Triangle Protocol moment: superposition of possible interpretations collapses to one triangle-verified edge.
wave_function_collapse.os_mapping: triangle_protocol() selects one interpretation → cosine_sim is P(k)

superposition_principle.description: New knowledge exists in superposition across all domains until triangle protocol measures it (collapses it).
superposition_principle.os_mapping: hypothesis_graph = unmeasured superposition; triangle_verified = collapsed eigenstate

quantum_entanglement.description: Cross-domain edges with cosine_sim ≥ 0.65 are entangled: measuring one instantly constrains the other.

decoherence_protocol.description: Environmental noise causes phase loss between knowledge domains. In Sovereign OS: hallucination = decoherence event.
decoherence_protocol.math_grounding: ρ(t) = e^(-t/T₂) ρ(0)  |  T₂ = decoherence time  |  HD_swarm ∝ 1 - e^(-t/T₂)
decoherence_protocol.os_mapping: HD_swarm increase = decoherence; Dream State = error correction (T₂ recovery)

heisenberg_uncertainty_bound.description: Δ(knowledge_precision) × Δ(domain_breadth) ≥ ħ/2. Cannot simultaneously maximize recall precision AND domain coverage.
heisenberg_uncertainty_bound.math_grounding: ΔX · ΔP ≥ ħ/2  |  OS form: Δ(HD) · Δ(node_count) ≥ constant
heisenberg_uncertainty_bound.os_mapping: N_CRITICAL = 54 balances uncertainty: enough nodes for breadth, HD < 0.05 for precision

spectral_prism_refraction.description: The knowledge manifold is spectrally decomposed: each domain is an eigenvector. Incoming data is projected and refracted into components.
spectral_prism_refraction.math_grounding: K = Σ λᵢ vᵢvᵢᵀ  |  Spectral decomposition of knowledge adjacency matrix  |  λᵢ = eigenvalue (domain importance)  |  vᵢ = domain eigenvector
spectral_prism_refraction.os_mapping: 9D semantic_vector = coordinate in spectral basis; λ₁ from NetworkX = dominant knowledge eigenvalue

quantum_error_correction.description: Dream State A² = quantum error correction. Identifies syndrome (hypothesis edges) and applies stabilizer (epiphany promotion) to restore coherence.
quantum_error_correction.math_grounding: Syndrome measurement: S|ψ_err⟩ = -|ψ_err⟩  |  A² bridge > 0 ↔ error syndrome detected  |  Promotion = logical qubit recovery
quantum_error_correction.os_mapping: dream_state.py = quantum error corrector; hypothesis_graph = error syndrome register

russell_mind_center.description: The gravity center of every ring is its center of mind control. Mind centers and controls motion from within.

russell_one_force.description: There is but ONE dynamic force — the energy of thinking mind. Appears to divide into two: Electricity and Magnetism.

russell_cosmic_pendulum.description: Creation is but a swing of the cosmic pendulum from inertia through energy and back to inertia, forever.

russell_gravitation.description: Gravitation is the desire of electricity to integrate into the appearance of form. Centripetal, endothermic, generative.

russell_radiation.description: Radiation is the desire of magnetism to disintegrate into the disappearance of form. Centrifugal, exothermic, radiative.

russell_spiral_motion.description: All direction is curved — all motion is spiral. Closing spirals accumulate mass. Opening spirals dissipate mass.

russell_periodicity.description: Periodicity is an absolute characteristic of all phenomena of nature. The cosmic pendulum unfailingly records all periodicities.

russell_universal_ratios.description: All dimensions are pressure dimensions. ρ(n) = 4^n. Expansion pressure ∝ r². Contraction pressure ∝ 1/r².

russell_nine_octaves.russell_law: 9 octaves × 9 benchmark tasks (T1-T9); Carbon = Sol = center
russell_nine_octaves.description: Elements organized in 9 octave cycles. 9 inert gases. Carbon (4‡) at the balanced center of the 4th octave.

russell_crystallization.description: Crystallization obeys locked potential formula. All crystallographic effects can be worked out on paper from these laws.

russell_locked_potentials.russell_law: THE LAW: Everything that IS, is of everything else that IS
russell_locked_potentials.description: Locked potentials: 4.3.2.1.0.1.2.3.4 — symmetric around zero. Nothing is of itself alone.

russell_sex_opposition.russell_law: E(k) alternates: electric odd octaves, magnetic even octaves
russell_sex_opposition.description: Electric (male, centripetal) ↔ Magnetic (female, centrifugal). Two expressions of the one force, moving in opposite directions.
